top_signals.title: Amazon air bridge supports Venezuela earthquake relief

top_signals.title: Merchant fleet trapped west of Hormuz drops below 700 vessels
top_signals.summary: AXSMarine AIS-derived data currently detects 689 merchant vessels west of the Strait of Hormuz, inside the Persian / Arabian Gulf, down from 1,061 vessels in early March. This is the first time since the start of the conflict that the tracked fleet inside the Gulf has fallen below 700 vessels, representing a decline of 372 ...

top_signals.title: Cambridge research puts 31% of Ethereum node activity in the US, where a third offline can stall finalization
top_signals.summary: Cambridge finds 31% of Ethereum node activity in the U.S., clustered on AWS, Hetzner and OVH, raising jurisdictional/counterparty questions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Revolut integrates its crypto exchange with AI assistants as agentic trading spreads
top_signals.summary: Revolut X now connects to Claude, Gemini, OpenClaw, and Cursor, letting crypto users analyze, backtest, and execute trades via AI prompts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
